V2 connection-formula machinery summarised: extends Jimbo-Miwa-Ueno 1-form omega_JMU to a closed form omega_hat on full extended phase space T_tilde x M (V2 eq. 1.10-1.11) via Malgrange-Bertola extension principle; worked applications V2 Section 3 P_VI (Theorem A, Barnes G-functions) + V2 Section 4 P_II non-Fuchsian (Theorem B); P_III(D_8) cited via [IP] Its-Prokhorov prior work. V2 does NOT directly treat P_III(D_6); V2 Section 4.1 + Theorem 4.2 non-Fuchsian apparatus is structurally applicable to V1's Lax pair (4.1) but explicit P_III(D_6) tau-function connection-constant computation remains open task.
